title: Bagasse Clamshell Food Containers, Disposable Food Containers, Takeaway Boxes for Hot, Cold, Wet, & Oily Food, WHITE Meal Prep Container, 450 ml, 50-Pcs
features: An Eco-Conscious Statement - Store your takeaways in this bagasse box. Our clamshell package is crafted from pure sugarcane pulp, making it a rigid, wonderful eco-alternative to plastic/paper disposable lunch box and food containers.

Packs Hot & Cold Menus - Your take away box should be versatile enough to hold various food temperatures. The unique thermal characteristics and water-resistant properties of bagasse takeaway containers make them hold hot, cold, wet, and oily foods without distorting or leaking.

Keeps Food Fresh Longer - Savor crisp, delicious food from natural takeaway food containers. All thanks to the breathable properties of bagasse, our disposable food containers prevent your meals from being soggy even after being stored for hours.

We Mary Practicality & Style! - Grab a compostable container with a minimalist finish and excellent durability. Our clamshell take out pack can withstand up to 120°C of heat in the microwave or oven. They’re also freezer & refrigerator-safe!

Safe for You & the Planet - We are taking small steps to reduce our dependence on plastic. Hence, we crafted our takeaway containers BPA, plastic, & tree-free. Plus, they’re designed for a circular economy — made from nature that eventually goes back to nature.
